_comment: Edit this file at /workspace/config.json and restart the pod to apply. This default ships with just two essential nodes (a node manager and a LoRA manager); add models/workflows as needed.
_models_comment: Models to download into /workspace/models/<category>. Supports HuggingFace, Civitai (set CIVITAI_API_KEY for gated downloads), and any raw URL.
_workflows_comment: Optional. Downloads into /workspace/user/default/workflows/. Supports Gist, raw GitHub, HF, etc.
